objective: Persist Overlord Sweep generated graph and metrics artifacts through automation pull requests instead of direct pushes to protected main.
scope_boundary: Modify only the Overlord Sweep generated-artifact persistence path and required issue-backed governance evidence.
Preserve the self-learning, graph update, and report issue generation behavior.
Use issue #487 as the governing issue for branch-protection-aligned generated artifact persistence.
out_of_scope: Changing repository rules or bypassing branch protection.
research_summary: Run 24739372677 completed all substantive sweep steps and updated issue #10, but final persistence failed because direct push to main violated the repository rule requiring PRs and local-ci-gate. The workflow needs to push generated artifacts to an automation branch and open a PR.

sprints.name: PR-based generated artifact persistence
sprints.goal: Make generated graph and metrics artifacts durable without violating protected main rules.
tasks: Add pull request write permission to the workflow.
Push generated artifact commits to a run-specific automation branch.
Create a PR for generated artifacts and expose the PR URL in step outputs.
Record PR status in the overlord report issue.
Fail only when commit, branch push, or PR creation fails.
acceptance_criteria: No generated artifact path pushes directly to main.
Generated artifacts create a remote branch and PR.
The sweep report issue includes PR persistence details.
Manual sweep no longer fails with GH013 direct-main rejection.

specialist_reviews.summary: The generated artifact commit was created, but direct push to main was rejected by intended repository rules. PR-based persistence is the bounded fix.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is a deterministic workflow persistence fix aligning automation with existing branch protection.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #487 may update Overlord Sweep generated artifact persistence and required governance evidence.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Merge the workflow persistence fix and re-run Overlord Sweep on main.

material_deviation_rules: If GitHub token permissions cannot create PRs, record the permission gap in the sweep report and fail the workflow.
If generated artifact PR checks fail, fix through the generated PR rather than bypassing branch protection.
